overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character in a black and gold suit walking through a rainy urban downtown environment. The character travels under an overpass, crosses streets, and navigates sidewalks with pedestrians while emergency vehicles are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath elevated train tracks

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man character walking steadily under the overpass, approaching the subway entrance

entered.detail: large green painted steel bridge structure covering the roadway
subway stairway entrance with green metal railings and advertising billboard
black garbage bags stacked on the sidewalk
green painted street lamp posts with white globes
black sedan parked along the curb under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a large green steel overpass on a wet rainy day. The subway entrance with advertisements is visible to the right, while trash bags line the curb. Sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalk under the artificial lighting of street lamps.

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into the open intersection with natural lighting
crossing the multi-lane street at the white striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, moving from the covered overpass into the open intersection

notable_agents.action: silver sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt
overhead traffic lights suspended over the intersection
modern glass and steel skyscrapers lining the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection despite the rain. The character crosses the white-striped crosswalk as vehicles wait at the traffic lights. Tall office buildings rise in the background as the camera moves through the open urban space.

events.description: pedestrians react and take photos as Spider-Man passes by

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians, some of whom are taking photos of the character

notable_agents.action: pedestrian raising phone to take a photo of Spider-Man

entered.detail: cluster of blue United States Postal Service mailboxes on the sidewalk
mature trees planted along the sidewalk edge with green foliage
commercial building facade with green painted window frames
red ambulance or fire truck visible in the distance with flashing lights
black metal park benches along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a tree-lined sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic. Blue mailboxes and green-trimmed storefronts line the path. Pedestrians react to the character's presence, with some stopping to take photos. The red emergency vehicle becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with emergency vehicle parked at curb

events.description: approaching emergency vehicle with flashing lights parked on the street

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the emergency vehicle, then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: red emergency vehicle with flashing lights parked at the curb

entered.detail: building facade with large arched doorway and stone trim

segments.scene_description: Approaching a parked red emergency vehicle with flashing lights near a building with an arched entrance. The character crosses the street again, continuing down the sidewalk past more pedestrians. The urban environment features tall buildings and wet reflective surfaces throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed depths of an urban overpass into a bright, bustling city intersection. It begins beneath a large green steel structure where artificial street lamps illuminate a wet sidewalk lined with trash bags and a subway entrance. As the character emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection where the camera follows them across a white-striped crosswalk surrounded by towering office buildings. The path then shifts toward a tree-lined sidewalk with green-trimmed storefronts and blue mailboxes, where pedestrians stop to take photos of the character. Finally, the camera moves past the crowd toward a parked red emergency vehicle with flashing lights stationed near a building with an arched entrance.
